title: eragrostis cilianensis subsp. major
intro: Eragrostis cilianensis subsp. major, also known as greater stagra, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis cilianensis subsp. major include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
